log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Kobold — Iron Concentration's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:8+4=12 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 8 falling damage. HP: 170/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:9+4=13 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.
=== ROUND 2 ===

ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.

Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.

--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 28 damage. Kobold — Iron Concentration HP: 39/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 14] HIT! 17 damage. Kobold — Iron Concentration HP: 22/67
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:12+10=22 vs AC 14] HIT! 14 damage. Kobold — Iron Concentration HP: 8/67
=== ROUND 4 ===
--- Kobold — Iron Concentration's turn ---
→ Dropping concentration on Hold Person
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kobold — Iron Concentration is affected by Greater Invisibility.
ACTION: Cast Healing Word (Level 1 slot) on Kobold — Iron Concentration.
→ Kobold — Iron Concentration healed for 7 HP. HP: 15/67
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attacks Kobold — Iron Concentration with Bite: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 14] CRITICAL HIT! 21 damage. Kobold — Iron Concentration HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
